creator: xenophon+fbsdports@irtnog.org
text:
I changed pkg-plist to use "@dirrmtry" directives instead of "@dirrm".

I modified the port to include license information (BSD) as well as a
pkg-message, which will help new users get a test instance of the CMS
started.

I've posted the new version of the shell archive to my web site (same
URL as before).

--=20
I FIGHT FOR THE USERS
